title: Link-Bearing Elements, Base URLs, Relations, Discovery, and Scheduling · Contract Workshop
summary: A public-interest site-quality team incrementally builds typed link-discovery record from original fixed response and HTML fixtures while retaining earlier authorization, HTTP, URL, provenance, politeness, accessibility, testing, security, and recovery requirements. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of typed link-discovery record while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evide…
objectives: Extract navigational, embedded, form, metadata, refresh, and structured-data URLs by element and attribute with distinct policies.
Apply effective response URL and the first valid HTML base element deliberately and retain both source and resolved references.
Interpret rel tokens such as canonical, alternate, next, prev, nofollow, sponsored, and ugc as evidence or hints, not universal commands.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-web-scraper-python cumulative authorized crawler and accessible site-audit portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python policy, URL, response, tree, frontier, record,
and report models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Sockets, DNS, public or private
sites, credentials, host files, native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright browsers,
accessibility claims, legal review, load, schedules, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlPolicy:
    owner_authorization_id: str
    allowed_origins: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_pages: int = 240
    maximum_response_bytes: int = 2_000_000
    minimum_origin_spacing_seconds: float = 1.0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlEvidence:
    revision: str
    policy_digest: str
    frontier_digest: str
    report_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Authorized Python crawler portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: scraper-link-provenance-1alqph
# Competency: scraper-link-provenance.
# Case 2736: a multilingual public-service site review.
# Operating constraint: personal data must remain minimized and redacted.
# Changed case: change one base URL, fragment, query, Unicode host, or redirect and reapply scope.
def evidence_scraper_link_provenance_1alqph(raw_references: int = 36, resolved_references: int = 34, scheduled_pages: int = 18, rejected_references: int = 16, unexplained_decisions: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1alqph = "1alqph-hpqla1-2736"
    assert evidence_variant_1alqph
    evidence_axes_1alqph = (
        "authorization1alqph",
        "url2736",
        "responsehpqla1",
        "tree1alqph2736",
        "frontier27361alqph",
        "reporthpqla12736",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1alqph)) == 6
    if raw_references < 1 or resolved_references < 0:
        return False, resolved_references, "link-count"
    if resolved_references > raw_references:
        return False, resolved_references, "resolution-accounting"
    if scheduled_pages + rejected_references != resolved_references:
        return False, scheduled_pages, "admission-reconciliation"
    if unexplained_decisions > 0:
        return False, unexplained_decisions, "link-provenance"
    assert scheduled_pages + rejected_references == resolved_references
    return True, scheduled_pages, "typed-link-discovery"
